Defines a vibration pattern with a short pulse of 250 ms duration and 100 strength.

# Purpose
The JSON configuration defines a vibration pattern named `short_pulse` with specific parameters. The `vibe_duration_ms` is set to 250 milliseconds, indicating the duration of the vibration. The `brake_duration_ms` is set to 0 milliseconds, meaning there is no pause after the vibration. The `strength` is set to 100, indicating the intensity of the vibration. The `pattern` array includes the `short_pulse` identifier, linking it to the defined vibration parameters.
